channel.title: UR usage cost
channel.description: Published price sheet changes for the UR subnet — the alpha demand deposit required per GiB and per user in each 7-day block, by staked-alpha tier.

item.title: UR usage cost update — 2026-07-08
item.description:
UR subnet 1 — demand deposit price per block (7 days). An operator pays the best tier whose staked-α threshold it meets; tier 0 applies to everyone.

TierStaked α thresholdα / GiBα / user
00 (everyone)11
1≥ 10000.10.1
sn: 1
# the alpha must be deposited as demand deposits per block (7 days)
tiered_per_block_demand_deposits:
  0:
    alpha_per_gib: 1
    alpha_per_user: 1
  1000:
    alpha_per_gib: 0.1
    alpha_per_user: 0.1
